headline: Skyworks vs. Qorvo: Two RF Chip Giants Fighting for the Same 5G Dollar
summary: Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ:SWKS) and Qorvo (NASDAQ:QRVO) just reported earnings as direct RF chip competitors, but here is the twist: they announced a merger that would create a roughly $22 billion combined RF and analog semiconductor company, expected to close in early 2027. These may be the last meaningful earnings to compare as separate businesses. Skyworks ... Skyworks vs. Qorvo: Two RF Chip Giants Fighting for the Same 5G Dollar
